headline: PSEG Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend for the Second Quarter of 2026
summary: The Board of Directors of Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE: PEG) today declared a $0.67 per share dividend on the outstanding common stock of the company for the second quarter of 2026.

headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On Public Service Enterprise with Hold Rating, Announces Price Target of $91
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   initiates coverage on Public Service Enterprise (NYSE:PEG) with a Hold rating and announces Price Target of $91.
